## Biome exclusive actions
## Actions from other sources
:::note
Some **Biome** rules might **not** have options, compared to the original rule.
:::
### @html-eslint/eslint-plugin
| @html-eslint/eslint-plugin Actions name | Biome Actions name |
| ---- | ---- |
| [sort-attrs](https://html-eslint.org/docs/rules/sort-attrs) |[useSortedAttributes](/assist/actions/use-sorted-attributes) (inspired) |

| eslint-plugin-astro Actions name | Biome Actions name |
| ---- | ---- |
| [sort-attributes](https://ota-meshi.github.io/eslint-plugin-astro/rules/sort-attributes) |[useSortedAttributes](/assist/actions/use-sorted-attributes) (inspired) |

| eslint-plugin-better-tailwindcss Actions name | Biome Actions name |
| ---- | ---- |
| [no-duplicate-classes](https://github.com/schoero/eslint-plugin-better-tailwindcss/blob/main/docs/rules/no-duplicate-classes.md) |[noDuplicateClasses](/assist/actions/no-duplicate-classes) (inspired) |
### eslint-plugin-svelte
| eslint-plugin-svelte Actions name | Biome Actions name |
| ---- | ---- |
| [sort-attributes](https://sveltejs.github.io/eslint-plugin-svelte/rules/sort-attributes/) |[useSortedAttributes](/assist/actions/use-sorted-attributes) (inspired) |
### eslint-plugin-vue
| eslint-plugin-vue Actions name | Biome Actions name |
| ---- | ---- |

Help us by [contributing](https://github.com/biomejs/biome/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) to the [analyzer](https://github.com/biomejs/biome/blob/main/crates/biome_analyze/CONTRIBUTING.md) or create a rule suggestion [here](https://github.com/biomejs/biome/discussions/categories/rule-suggestion).
